hyperedges.label: Scene graph view builds route digraph then runs cycle/topology analysis
Tests assert WASM validation output matches native validate_document
Worker transport/tick mutates process-global RuntimeSession transport state
Optional profiles gate profile-specific payloads (execution DSP metadata; host-binding scene bindings)
Scene route graph checks: acyclic directed graph and no multi-writer fan-in to sinks
WASM worker envelope: open document → create runtime session (default scene) → transport tick loop
Validation surface: native validate_document vs WASM din_document_validate_json_impl parity on shared bytes
Route graph: build_scene_route_graph, SceneGraphView, cycle-related IssueCodes, invalid-route-cycle fixture
Archived skills: patch-contract-change and registry-parity redirect to react-din / external registry; active work uses v2-refactor-task

nodes.label: din-core crate root (re-exports document stack + runtime)
Route graph analysis (cycle detection + topological order)
RouteEndpoint (sceneInput, sceneOutput, dspPort, transport, track, sequencer, ...)
Policy: thin WASM wrappers, no duplicate validation outside din-document
react-din owns published patch JSON schema (README)
DEEP: thin FFI/WASM, reuse Rust-native logic
